note: Texas regulators alleged securities fraud and insolvency against Abra-linked entities and Bill Barhydt.
Texas said state actions generally alleged the firms were insolvent or nearly insolvent by March 31 2023.
CoinMarketCap Academy reported that the Texas filing said Abra-linked entities transferred assets to Binance.
The Texas filing summary reported funds at Babel Finance Auros Genesis and Three Arrows Capital.
Texas said the settlement would let investors withdraw assets and convert unclaimed assets to fiat for checks.
Iowa said remaining assets after the seven day notice period would be converted to U.S. dollars and transferred to a restitution fund.
CSBS said a multistate settlement could return up to 82.1 million dollars in virtual assets to consumers.
